SEARCH
Package org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.utils.compatibility

Class WorldBorderCompatibility

java.lang.Object
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.utils.compatibility.WorldBorderCompatibility
@AvailableSince("5.7") public final class WorldBorderCompatibility extends Object
Compatibility class used to handle API changes in WorldBorder class.
Since:
5.7

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    changeSizeDuration(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, double newSize, TickDuration duration)
    Changes the world border size, preferring the tick-based API when available.
    static double
    getWarningTime(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder)
    Gets the world border warning time in seconds, using the most appropriate API available.
    static int
    getWarningTimeTicks(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder)
    Gets the world border warning time in ticks, using the most precise API available.
    static void
    setWarningTimeDuration(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, TickDuration duration)
    Sets the world border warning time, preferring tick-based APIs when available.
    static void
    setWarningTimeTicks(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, int ticks)
    Sets the world border warning time in ticks.
    static boolean
    supportsChangeSizeInTicks()
    Checks whether the current server supports changing world border size over a duration in ticks.
    static boolean
    supportsSetWarningTimeInTicks()
    Checks whether the current server supports setting the world border warning time in ticks.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • getWarningTimeTicks

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static int getWarningTimeTicks(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder)
      Gets the world border warning time in ticks, using the most precise API available.
      If the server exposes getWarningTimeTicks(), that value is returned directly. Otherwise, the older getWarningTime() API is used and converted from seconds to ticks.
      Parameters:
      worldBorder - The world border to query.
      Returns:
      The warning time in ticks.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If neither warning-time getter is available.
      Since:
      5.7

    • getWarningTime

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static double getWarningTime(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder)
      Gets the world border warning time in seconds, using the most appropriate API available.
      If the server exposes getWarningTimeTicks(), that value is converted from ticks to seconds. Otherwise, the older getWarningTime() API is used directly.
      Parameters:
      worldBorder - The world border to query.
      Returns:
      The warning time in seconds.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If neither warning-time getter is available.
      Since:
      5.7

    • supportsSetWarningTimeInTicks

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static boolean supportsSetWarningTimeInTicks()
      Checks whether the current server supports setting the world border warning time in ticks.
      Returns:
      True if setWarningTimeTicks(int) is available, else false.
      Since:
      5.7

    • setWarningTimeTicks

      public static void setWarningTimeTicks(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, int ticks)
      Sets the world border warning time in ticks.
      This is a convenience wrapper around setWarningTimeDuration(WorldBorder, TickDuration) that converts the given tick value into a TickDuration first.
      Parameters:
      worldBorder - The world border to update.
      ticks - The warning time in ticks.
      Since:
      5.7

    • setWarningTimeDuration

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static void setWarningTimeDuration(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, TickDuration duration)
      Sets the world border warning time, preferring tick-based APIs when available.
      If the server supports setWarningTimeTicks(int), the provided duration is applied in ticks. Otherwise, the older setWarningTime(int) API is used and the duration is converted to seconds.
      Parameters:
      worldBorder - The world border to update.
      duration - The warning duration to apply.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If neither warning-time setter is available.
      Since:
      5.7

    • supportsChangeSizeInTicks

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static boolean supportsChangeSizeInTicks()
      Checks whether the current server supports changing world border size over a duration in ticks.
      Returns:
      True if changeSize(double, long) is available, else false.
      Since:
      5.7

    • changeSizeDuration

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static void changeSizeDuration(org.bukkit.WorldBorder worldBorder, double newSize, TickDuration duration)
      Changes the world border size, preferring the tick-based API when available.
      If the server supports changeSize(double, long), the size change is applied in ticks. Otherwise, the older setSize(double, long) API is used and the duration is converted to seconds.
      Parameters:
      worldBorder - The world border to update.
      newSize - The new border size.
      duration - The transition duration to apply.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If neither size-changing API is available.
      Since:
      5.7
